pitchSequence.description: Fastball misses outside
Curveball misses
Fastball swung on and missed
Fisted foul off to the left
Hit in the air to center field. Routine play for Ortega. And he makes the catch for the first out of the inning

notes: 5-pitch AB, flyout to center. Count was 2-2 when put in play. Righty-righty matchup.

pitchSequence.description: Dribbled foul down the first base line
And he fouls another one off
Fastball misses low
Fastball called strike three

notes: 4-pitch AB, called strikeout. Count was 1-2 when struck out. Topanga's third strikeout of the evening. Righty-righty matchup.

pitchSequence.description: Curveball misses low
Grounded to second. Cortez is up with it and he flips to first to retire Stipe to end the inning

notes: 2-pitch AB, groundout 4-3. Count was 1-0 when put in play. Righty-righty matchup. Padolina sets the Loons down in order.

pitchSequence.description: Fastball misses high
That fastball is called a strike
Slider low and outside
Hit in the air to right center. Vega drifting over. And he makes the catch for out number one

notes: 4-pitch AB, flyout to right center. Count was 2-1 when put in play. Righty-righty matchup. Vega makes the catch in right center.

pitchSequence.description: Curveball misses low
Grounded to first. Primero will have it unassisted. And he steps on the bag for out number two

notes: 2-pitch AB, groundout 3U (Primero unassisted). Count was 1-0 when put in play. Righty-righty matchup.

pitchSequence.description: Curveball misses outside
Hammered foul and out of play
And he fouls another one off
High fly ball to deep left center. Vega racing back. And he makes the catch to end the inning

notes: 4-pitch AB, flyout to deep left center. Count was 1-2 when put in play. Righty-righty matchup. Cadillac goes down in order. Score remains Cars 7, Loons 2.
